title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMWater
description: Bodies of water from OpenStreetMap tagged with water=* or natural=water. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMWater

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

waterType.description: Property. The OSM water tag classifying the water body. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:water'

intermittent.description: Property. Indicates if the water body only exists during certain periods. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:intermittent'

salt.description: Property. Indicates if the water is saline. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:salt'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
